Original: in some [Active|ACTIVE] [Civilian|CIVILIAN] [Professions|PROFESSION] like [FARMER] and [MINER] can Construct [Structures|STRUCTURE] to [Harvest|HARVEST] [Resources|RESOURCE] from [Deposits|DEPOSIT] or [Dense Forests|FOREST]. This requires either [TIMBER] or [STONE-BLOCKS], and is generally not something you'll start doing until a year or two into the game.
Translation: 中的某些[主动|ACTIVE][平民|CIVILIAN][职业|PROFESSION]，如[FARMER]和[MINER]，可以建造[建筑|STRUCTURE]，从[矿藏|DEPOSIT]或[森林|FOREST]中[采收|HARVEST][资源|RESOURCE]。这需要[TIMBER]或[STONE-BLOCKS]，通常要到游戏一两年后才会开始。
Note: Trial Common Concepts construct help text; preserves concept IDs.

Original: in some [Active|ACTIVE] [Civilian|CIVILIAN] [Professions|PROFESSION] like [GATHERER] and [HUNTER] to [Harvest|HARVEST] [Resources|RESOURCE] from [Deposits|DEPOSIT] or [Dense Forests|FOREST] without the need for a [Structure|STRUCTURE]. Foraging is generally a less efficient way of [Producing|PRODUCE] Resources though, so once you've [Learned|LEARN] Professions capable of [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] Structures and have the [TIMBER] to do so it's probably time to switch over.
Translation: 中的某些[主动|ACTIVE][平民|CIVILIAN][职业|PROFESSION]，如[GATHERER]和[HUNTER]，无需[建筑|STRUCTURE]即可从[矿藏|DEPOSIT]或[森林|FOREST]中[采收|HARVEST][资源|RESOURCE]。不过采集通常不是最有效的[生产|PRODUCE]资源方式；一旦你[学会|LEARN]了能够[建造|CONSTRUCT]建筑的职业并拥有[TIMBER]，大概就该切换过去。
Note: Trial Common Concepts forage help text; preserves concept IDs.

Original: , which is invaluable during the [winter|SEASON]. A strategy you will often employ during the cold months is to alternate between Encamping on one turn to replenish your Supply and then perform whatever action you were in the middle of on the next (e.g. [Foraging|FORAGE] or [identifying Deposits|UNIDENTIFIED].[BLANK-LINE]This action can only be performed if a Unit hasn't yet spent any
Translation: ，这在[冬季|SEASON]极为宝贵。寒冷月份常用策略是交替进行：一回合扎营补充补给，下一回合继续之前的行动（如[采集|FORAGE]或[识别矿藏|UNIDENTIFIED]）。[BLANK-LINE]只有单位尚未花费任何
